title: CI: Parallelize and speed up plugins-test
author: skoeva

findings.description: Commit 'CI: Parallelize and speed up plugins-test' uses uppercase 'CI:' instead of 'ci:' and is missing a SubArea segment. Expected: 'ci: plugins-test: Parallelize and speed up'. Persistent across prior re-reviews.
TARBALL path captured and exported before cd ../examples, preventing path resolution issues in parallel workers.
xargs -P with set -e inside sh -c correctly propagates worker failure to parent shell.
.PHONY declaration added, npm ci used for pluginctl, two Jest invocations merged with --runInBand.
